---
title: "Planning the Invisible: End-to-End Sensor Deployment Regret Minimization for Anomaly-Aware Water Networks"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "H. Wang"
  - "X. Xiao"
year: 2026
venue: "Water Research"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "sensor placement"
  - "regret minimization"
  - "water networks"
  - "end-to-end optimization"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Submitted (Water Research, 2026)

This manuscript links anomaly-aware forecasting quality with sensor deployment decisions through regret-aware end-to-end optimization in water networks.
